top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(cost) 
FROM expense 
WHERE expense_id IN (
    SELECT expense_id 
    FROM expense e
    JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
    JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
    WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%food%' OR e.expense_description LIKE '%Food%'
);

SELECT AVG(cost) 
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%food%' 
  AND ev.event_date < date('now');

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(cost) 
FROM expense 
WHERE expense_id IN (
    SELECT expense_id 
    FROM expense e
    JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
    JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
    WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%food%' OR e.expense_description LIKE '%Food%'
);
